name: VoidMail
description: Disposable encrypted email service with zero-knowledge architecture. No logs, no metadata, no trace.

name: Spectra AI
description: On-device LLM inference engine. Run models locally without sending data to the cloud. Privacy-preserving AI.

name: ChainVault
description: Multi-chain non-custodial wallet with built-in DEX aggregator. Your keys, your crypto.

name: zkProof SDK
description: Developer toolkit for generating and verifying zero-knowledge proofs. Supports SNARK and STARK circuits.

name: GhostNet VPN
description: Decentralized VPN mesh network. Traffic routed through community nodes. No central server, no logs.

name: Neural Sentinel
description: AI-powered smart contract auditing engine. Detects vulnerabilities before deployment using trained models.
